name: AgentMail MCP Server
what_it_does: Official MCP server from AgentMail (agentmail-to org) for AgentMail — an email inbox API purpose-built for AI agents. Gives agents their own email inboxes to send, receive, and manage email programmatically. Designed specifically for agent-to-agent and agent-to-human email workflows, not a wrapper around personal email accounts.
use_cases: Giving AI agents their own dedicated email addresses for outreach workflows
Automated email communication pipelines where agents send and receive messages
Agent-to-agent communication via email in multi-agent systems
Automated customer outreach workflows with AI-generated email content
not_for: Reading your personal Gmail or Outlook inbox (use Gmail/Outlook MCPs instead)
Bulk email marketing (use dedicated email marketing platforms)
Enterprise email management for human teams
best_when: An AI agent needs its own email identity to send and receive messages as part of an automated workflow — not managing a human's inbox but acting as a first-class email participant.
avoid_when: You just need to read or reply from an existing human email account. AgentMail is purpose-built for agent-owned inboxes.

auth.notes: AgentMail API key required. Sign up at agentmail.to for agent inbox provisioning.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier for development/testing; check agentmail.to for current limits
pricing.paid_tiers: Paid plans for production volume and additional inboxes
pricing.notes: Startup-stage service purpose-built for AI agents. Pricing model evolving — check current pricing at agentmail.to.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits apply; check documentation for current limits

known_agent_gotchas: Early-stage startup — API surface may evolve; pin versions in production
Agent-sent emails can appear spammy — configure SPF/DKIM properly through AgentMail
Email deliverability is nuanced — test with real inboxes before deploying at scale
Agent email workflows need careful rate limiting to avoid abuse or spam classification
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Agent email contains message content. API key authentication. HTTPS. Email content stored by AgentMail — review their data retention policies.

security_score_components.security_notes: Email content is privacy-sensitive. HTTPS. API key auth. Startup — verify data policies before production use.
